creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
An object oriented X.509 certificate revocation list 
parser with numerous methods for directly extracting 
information from certificate revocation lists:
http://search.cpan.org/dist/Crypt-X509-CRL/

- This port is needed as a new dependency for forthcoming
version 2.0.2 of existing port security/p5-openxpki
- "portlint -ACN" says: looks fine.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180328 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.26.2 runs ok.
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
